name: Autari Partner Programme
description: Discover information about the Autari automation partnership programme, including earning model, benefits, FAQ, and how to submit a partner application.

skills.name: Get Partnership Information
skills.description: Retrieve structured information about the Autari partner programme including how it works, earning model (one-time setup fee, recurring subscription revenue, B2C royalties), and benefits.

skills.name: Get FAQ
skills.description: Retrieve frequently asked questions and answers about partnering with Autari, including costs, technical requirements, earning potential, and client ownership.

skills.name: Partner Application
skills.description: Submit a partner application with name, email, area of expertise, and optional fields (phone, company, message). Applications are reviewed within 48 hours.
